label_notes: Source: training knowledge (live fetch blocked). Poshmark is a social marketplace acquired by South Korean company Naver. Major gaps: unclear whether personal data is sold and limited disclosure on international data transfers. Shares with advertising partners. User-generated content (listings, messages) retention policies should be clarified. Parent company structure may affect data handling.
